title: Check Whether the Overall System RMS Page Is Blank Because RMS Access Is Blocked
summary: Use this source-specific diagnostic check to determine whether a blank Overall System RMS page matches the training-source explanation that the page should display the Geek+ RMS web page but may appear blank when firewall access is not open. This procedure is limited to observation and documentation only.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing the Overall System RMS page and the RMS display area is blank, and you need to determine whether that blank condition is consistent with the source-described access limitation rather than assuming an on-screen data issue.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to confirm a specific network root cause beyond the source statement that the firewall is not open.
Do not use this procedure to open the firewall or perform network remediation.
Do not use this procedure as a replacement for deeper RMS access troubleshooting when RMS visibility is required.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Overall System RMS page, compare the observed blank state to the source description, and document the observation and limitation.

safety_notes: This procedure is observational and documentation-focused only.
Do not assume the blank page confirms any specific network root cause beyond the source statement that the firewall is not open.
If RMS visibility is required and the page remains blank, escalate.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System RMS page
Source-backed description of expected RMS page contents

access_required: Ability to open or view the Overall System RMS page
system_preconditions: The Overall System RMS page is available for review
external_references: UPSFORTNA OptiSweep Training Day 1 source segment describing the Overall System RMS page and blank display condition

visual_references.description: Overall System RMS training slide showing that the page should display the Geek+ RMS web page, with system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right, and noting that it may appear blank when firewall access is not open.

steps.title: Open or view the Overall System RMS page
steps.purpose: Access the page being evaluated so the RMS display area can be checked.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Overall System RMS page and locate the area where RMS content is expected to appear.
steps.expected_result: The Overall System RMS page is visible for inspection.
steps.healthy_condition: The page is accessible and the RMS display area can be reviewed.
steps.failure_condition: The page cannot be opened or the RMS display area cannot be viewed.

actions.label: View Overall System RMS page
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Overall System RMS page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Overall System RMS page area that should display RMS content.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Overall System RMS page cannot be accessed for review.

source_evidence.text: Open or view the Overall System RMS page. [Image support needed: slide or screen showing the Overall System RMS page area that should display RMS.]

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Overall System RMS, this page will show the Geek+ RMS web page.

steps.title: Observe whether the RMS display area is blank
steps.purpose: Determine the current visible state of the RMS page area.
steps.instruction: Inspect the RMS web page area and note whether it is blank instead of showing the expected RMS content.
steps.expected_result: You can state whether the RMS display area is blank.
steps.healthy_condition: The page shows visible RMS content.
steps.failure_condition: The RMS web page area is blank.

actions.label: Inspect RMS display area
actions.exact_action: Observe whether the RMS web page area is blank instead of showing the expected RMS content.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The RMS web page area that should contain the Geek+ RMS display.

stop_or_escalate_if: RMS visibility is required and the page remains blank.

source_evidence.text: Observe whether the RMS web page area is blank instead of showing the expected RMS content.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This page should show RMS, but the firewall is not open, so it just kind of shows blank.

steps.title: Compare the blank display to the source-described firewall limitation
steps.purpose: Determine whether the observed blank condition matches the source explanation.
steps.instruction: Compare the observed blank display to the source statement that the page should show RMS but can appear blank when the firewall is not open.
steps.expected_result: You can determine whether the blank page is consistent with the source-described access limitation.
steps.healthy_condition: The observed blank condition matches the source-described scenario.
steps.failure_condition: The observed condition does not clearly match the source description or cannot be confidently compared.

actions.label: Compare observation to source statement
actions.exact_action: Compare the blank display to the source statement that the page should show RMS but can appear blank when the firewall is not open.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The slide text and associated explanation that the page should show RMS but may be blank when firewall access is not open.

RMS visibility is required and the page remains blank.

source_evidence.text: Compare the blank display to the source statement that the page should show RMS but can appear blank when the firewall is not open.

steps.title: Confirm the expected RMS page contents
steps.purpose: Verify what the page is supposed to display so the blank condition is interpreted correctly.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the expected page content would normally include the Geek+ RMS web page, with system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right.
steps.expected_result: You can describe the expected RMS content that is missing from the blank page.
steps.healthy_condition: Expected content is understood as the Geek+ RMS web page with system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right.
steps.failure_condition: Expected content is unclear or cannot be confirmed from the source.

actions.label: Confirm expected RMS content
actions.exact_action: Confirm whether the expected page content would normally include the Geek+ RMS web page, with system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The description of expected RMS content, including system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right.

stop_or_escalate_if: Expected RMS visibility is needed for active troubleshooting and the page remains blank.

source_evidence.text: Confirm whether the expected page content would normally include the Geek+ RMS web page, with system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This page will show the Geek+ RMS web page, will also show system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right.

steps.title: Document the blank page and the source-backed access limitation
steps.purpose: Create a clear record that the blank display is consistent with the source-described limitation.
steps.instruction: Record that the page is blank and note the source-backed possibility that firewall access is preventing RMS from being displayed.
steps.expected_result: The observation is documented with the source-backed explanation and any need for escalation.
steps.healthy_condition: The blank page is documented as consistent with the source-described firewall access limitation.
steps.failure_condition: The blank condition is undocumented or is recorded as a confirmed root cause without source support.

success_criteria: The Overall System RMS page has been reviewed.
The observer has determined whether the RMS display area is blank.
The blank condition, if present, has been documented as consistent with the source-described firewall access limitation.
Any need for escalation due to required RMS visibility has been noted.
healthy_conditions: The Overall System RMS page is accessible for review.
Expected RMS content is understood to be the Geek+ RMS web page with system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right.
A blank page is recognized as potentially consistent with the source-described firewall access limitation.
failure_conditions: The Overall System RMS page cannot be accessed.
The RMS display area remains blank when visibility is required.
The blank page is treated as confirmed root cause without source support.
Expected RMS content cannot be confirmed from the supplied source evidence.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if RMS visibility is required and the page remains blank.
Escalate if further diagnosis requires confirmation beyond the source statement that the firewall is not open.
Escalate if the page cannot be accessed or reviewed.
